metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins and skills.

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development workflow: codebase mapping, spec, plan, implement, review and debug skills that prove every requirement is built and tested. Priority-tagged requirements, evidence-or-zero coverage, a P0 mutation/discrimination sensor, blind multi-lens local code review with adversarial verification, and a self-improving lessons memory. Brownfield-first.

plugins.name: status-report
plugins.description: Generate a polished, leadership-ready status report (and optional enterprise action plan) for any fix, incident or in-flight change — styled for WhatsApp/email, interviewing you one question at a time when context is thin.
